items.situation: friend inviting another to a study group or social event
items.speaker: We're all meeting at the library tonight to study.

options.A: Actually, I might swing by after dinner.
options.B: The exam covers only the first three chapters.
options.C: My sister is visiting from out of town.
options.D: I'll bring the meeting agenda then.

items.explanation: 说话人是在间接邀请对方今晚去图书馆学习。A 用话语标记 Actually 开头，表示自己可能晚饭后过去，自然地回应了邀请并推进对话，是正确答案。B 抓住 study 联想到考试范围，只是陈述事实，没有回应邀请，属语义联想干扰。C 与话题完全无关，属离题干扰。D 把 meeting（碰面）误解成正式会议，回答带议程，属一词多义误解干扰。

items.speaker: I can't make our appointment on Thursday afternoon.

options.A: The doctor's office is near the pharmacy.
options.B: Well, how about early next week instead?
options.C: I painted the spare bedroom last weekend.
options.D: I'll make enough for everyone to share.

items.explanation: 说话人表示周四下午无法赴约，隐含需要改期。B 用 Well 开头并提议下周初，间接地推进了改期安排，是正确答案。A 由 appointment 联想到看医生的地点，只描述诊所位置，没有回应改期，属语义联想干扰。C 完全离题。D 把 make（赴约）误解成 make（做/准备食物），属一词多义误解干扰。

items.situation: offering help to someone who seems stressed
items.speaker: Do you want some help carrying those boxes?

options.A: The boxes arrived earlier than expected.
options.B: Every hour on the half hour.
options.C: Actually, that would be a huge relief.
options.D: I bought that jacket on sale.

items.explanation: 说话人主动提出帮忙搬箱子。C 用 Actually 开头，表示那会是极大的解脱，自然接受了帮助，是正确答案。A 抓住 boxes 只谈箱子到得早，没有回应帮忙的好意，属语义联想干扰。B 回答的是频率（多久一次），答非所问，属问错问题类型干扰。D 与话题无关，属离题干扰。

items.situation: student asking about exam format or study materials
items.speaker: Where do professors post the study guides?

options.A: The library closes at midnight tonight.
options.B: I finished my history essay this morning.
options.C: They're due at the end of the week.
options.D: Actually, they're all on the course website.

items.explanation: 说话人问复习资料发布在哪里（问地点）。D 用 Actually 开头，指出资料都在课程网站上，直接回应了地点问题，是正确答案。A 由 study 联想到图书馆，只说闭馆时间，答非所问，属语义联想干扰。B 完全离题。C 回答的是截止时间（问何时），而说话人问的是地点，属问错问题类型干扰。

items.situation: asking a store clerk about a return or exchange
items.speaker: Why won't the store accept my return?

options.A: Well, the receipt is over thirty days old.
options.B: The store opens at nine tomorrow morning.
options.C: My neighbor just adopted a puppy.
options.D: It's in the aisle by the entrance.

items.explanation: 说话人问为什么商店不接受退货（问原因）。A 用 Well 开头，说明小票已超过三十天，正好解释了原因，是正确答案。B 抓住 store 只谈营业时间，没有回应原因，属语义联想干扰。C 与话题无关，属离题干扰。D 回答的是位置（在哪个货架），答非所问，属问错问题类型干扰。

items.situation: two classmates discussing a group project deadline
items.speaker: What are we going to do about Friday's deadline?

options.A: Friday is the last day of the month.
options.B: Don't worry, I already asked for an extension.
options.C: The printer in the lab is broken again.
options.D: Yes, the project counts for half our grade.

items.explanation: 说话人为周五的截止日期发愁。B 没有直接回答问题，而是解决了背后的难题——已经申请了延期，属于 context_shift，是正确答案。A 抓住 Friday 只谈它是月末，没有解决问题，属语义联想干扰。C 完全离题。D 用 Yes 回答，但说的是项目占分，答非所问，属问错问题类型干扰。

items.situation: student asking about a campus event or concert
items.speaker: How am I supposed to get concert tickets?

options.A: The band is releasing a new album.
options.B: I left my umbrella in the classroom.
options.C: Don't worry, I can grab an extra one.
options.D: The doors open around seven tonight.

items.explanation: 说话人苦恼于怎么弄到演唱会门票。C 没有解释流程，而是直接解决了需求——我可以多拿一张给你，属于 context_shift，是正确答案。A 由 concert 联想到乐队出新专辑，没有帮上忙，属语义联想干扰。B 完全离题。D 回答的是开场时间（问何时），而说话人问的是怎么弄到票，属问错问题类型干扰。

items.situation: arranging a ride or carpool with a friend
items.speaker: Can you give me a lift on Saturday?

options.A: The car needs an oil change soon.
options.B: That movie was longer than I expected.
options.C: It's parked behind the grocery store.
options.D: Sure, I'll swing by around nine.

items.explanation: 说话人问周六能不能搭个车。D 用 Sure 答应，并说九点左右过去接，自然地回应了请求，是正确答案。A 抓住 lift 联想到车需要换机油，没有答应搭车，属语义联想干扰。B 完全离题。C 回答的是车停在哪里（问地点），而说话人问的是能否搭车，属问错问题类型干扰。

items.situation: student asking a classmate about lecture content
items.speaker: What did the professor say about the essay?

options.A: Honestly, I zoned out for most of it.
options.C: I ran into your roommate at lunch.
options.D: It's not due until next Wednesday.

items.explanation: 说话人问教授关于论文说了什么。A 用口语习语 zoned out（走神）坦白自己大半没听进去，是自然真实的回应，属 idiomatic，是正确答案。B 抓住 essay 只谈格式要求，没有回应教授说了什么，属语义联想干扰。C 完全离题。D 回答的是截止时间（问何时），而说话人问的是内容，属问错问题类型干扰。

items.situation: a neighbor asking to borrow a tool
items.speaker: Do you have a ladder I could borrow?

options.A: The hardware store sells sturdy ladders.
options.B: Sure, how tall does it need to be?
options.C: I watered the plants this morning.
options.D: I already returned the drill you lent me.

items.explanation: 说话人问能不能借个梯子。B 用 Sure 答应后反问需要多高，用反问推进对话，属 counter_question，是正确答案。A 抓住 ladder 联想到五金店有卖，没有回应借的请求，属语义联想干扰。C 完全离题。D 把 borrow（借）误解成归还别的工具，答非所问，属一词多义误解干扰。
